items.title: Jet fuel and travel plans: what you need to know
items.summary: UK airlines say that they are not currently seeing a shortage of jet fuel. The government is working with industry and international partners to keep passengers moving.

items.title: All eyes on LA ahead of largest ever UK trade mission to the US
items.summary: Hundreds of UK business leaders will travel to the US later this month as part of the largest ever UK trade mission to the country, building on the success of the State Visit of Their Majesties the King and Queen.

items.title: Notice: Green Heat Network Fund (GHNF): guidance on how to apply
items.summary: Capital grant support is available for the development of new and existing low-carbon heat networks. This page contains guidance and details of how to apply via Triple Point.

items.title: Decision: Complaint to UK NCP by Possible about Virgin Atlantic Ltd
items.summary: A complaint was filed by Possible: the 10:10 Foundation alleging that Virgin Atlantic Ltd has made misleading statements about its environmental performance.
